title: ScaleViewCaptureSettings
description: ScaleViewCaptureSettings: View capture settings allowing the size of the image to be controled as a scale of the current viewport size.

Scale.description: Scale factor of the current preview. A factor of 2 gives a resolution twice to the current viewport resolution.

FileFormat.description: File format to be used. Defaults to png.

DrawAxes.description: Controls if the world axes should be captured or not.

DrawGrid.description: Controls if the grid should be captured or not.

DrawGridAxes.description: Controls if the grid axes should be captured or not.

TransparentBackground.description: Controls if the background should be transparent.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
